background: Ninety and 95 percent confidence intervals for the alcohol and esophageal cancer illustrative case-control data are calculated.

task.query: What is the value of the estimated odds ratio (OR) and its natural logarithm (ln(OR))?
task.answer: We've established \(\widehat{O R}=5.640\). Therefore, \(\ln \widehat{O R}=\ln(5.640)\) = 1.7299 (by calculator).

task.query: How is the standard error (SE) of the natural logarithm of the odds ratio (ln(OR)) calculated, and what is its value?
What is the 90% confidence interval for the odds ratio (OR)?
What is the 95% confidence interval for the odds ratio (OR)?

meta_info.caption: Confidence interval for the odds ratio (Alcohol and  esophageal cancer).
